message.content:
@startuml
title PB-351 UC23 – View Offers Details on System Management

abstract "This use case will retrieve details of a specific Offer. This endpoint already exists on the Partners and Offers platform, but we have to add on response the new fields."

actor "UI (System Admin and Manager – System Management)" as ui

rectangle "Partners and Offers Platform" as platform {
  rectangle "Next Platform" as platform_component
  database "Next Database" as db
}

activate platform_component

note right of platform_component
  **Note to developers**
  Add these fields on response:
  1. . benefit
  2. . listImage
  3. . listImageVersion
  4. . partnerName

  Also, change the type of:
  5. . startDate
  6. . endDate
  To consider timestamp from now on.
end note

note right of db
  For partnerName consider the field 'FANTASY_NAME' in PATNER table.
end note

ui -> platform_component: 1 HTTP GET /offers/{offerId}
platform_component --> ui: 2 response

deactivate platform_component

@enduml
